channel.title: Owasp-Ptk on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Owasp-Ptk on ZAP

item.title: OWASP PTK Findings as ZAP Alerts (Juice Shop Walkthrough)
item.description: OWASP PTK 9.8.0 and the ZAP OWASP PTK add-on 0.3.0 now let ZAP display OWASP PTK findings directly as ZAP Alerts. This post shows how to install the add-on, choose which PTK rules to run (SAST / IAST / DAST), optionally auto-start scans on browser launch, and then scan OWASP Juice Shop with all results visible in ZAP.
